## Checklist

- [ ] `server`: `npm run lint && npm test` pass

- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] User-facing strings added to `client/src/i18n.jsx` (EN + FR), if any
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or production-specific details added
